name: Portuguese Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together 1 cup sugar and butter until well blended.
2. Add lemon zest and juice; mix to blend.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time until smooth.
4. Gradually stir in 3 cups flour, mixing well.
5. Cover and refrigerate the dough until firm enough to handle easily (at least 3 hours or up to 2 days).
6. For easier handling, chill the dough before forming ring-shaped cookies.
7. Divide the dough into two portions. Cover one portion and divide the other into 8 equal pieces.
8. With floured fingers, roll each piece on a lightly floured board to form a 10-inch rope.
9. Overlap the ends of each rope slightly to form a ring.
10. Place rings about 1 inch apart on a greased baking sheet.
11. Sprinkle with sugar.
12. Bake in a preheated oven at 300°F until golden, 35-40 minutes.
13. Remove cookies from pans and let cool completely on racks.
14. Repeat with the remaining dough.
15. Serve or store airtight for up to 10 days.
